column1: # Bahmanpouri et al. (2022) Table 2 -- Phi(M) and M for the seven cross sections
# method: manual transcription 2026-07-06 from the rendered PDF page 6 (clean text layer).
# note: Phi(M) equals the ADCP ratio Um/Umax row-by-row.  The FreibergerMulde CS3 row is
#       internally inconsistent as printed: Phi(M=1.16)=0.594=0.68/1.14 (the ADCP ratio)
#       not the printed 0.678 (which corresponds to M=2.33).  This is codified as a
#       required anomaly in bahmanpouri_lib._self_test rather than silently corrected.
